findings.description: The knowledge file renders the directive table with fabricated column headers '設定項目' and '値'. The source RST table has no header row (no `===` separator line) — it is a plain data table with no column labels.
findings.source_evidence: Source table: `+------------------+-------------+----------------------------+` / `|text-encoding     |Windows-31J  |                            |` — no `====` row separating a header. Knowledge file adds: `| 設定項目 | 値 |` which does not exist in the source.
